All Properties

Property Description Domain Range Defined In
Documents (dppk:documents) Relates the product to associated digital documents. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource Compliance.jsonld
Certifications (dppk:certifications) Relates the product to its certifications. dppk:Product dppk:Certification Compliance.jsonld
Additional Certification (dppk:additionalCertification) Relates the product to any additional voluntary or secondary certifications. dppk:Product dppk:Certification Compliance.jsonld
Substances of Concern (dppk:substancesOfConcern) Relates the product to any substances of concern it contains. dppk:Product dppk:Component Compliance.jsonld
Packaging (dppk:packaging) A list of packaging elements associated with the product. dppk:Product dppk:Packaging Compliance.jsonld
Production Steps (dppk:productionSteps) dppk:Product dppk:ProductionStep Compliance.jsonld
Certification Name (dppk:certificationName) The name of the certification. dppk:Certification xsd:string Compliance.jsonld
Certification Identifier (dppk:certificationId) The unique identifier or number of the certification. dppk:Certification xsd:string Compliance.jsonld
Certification URL (dppk:certificationUrl) A web link to the certification details or registry. dppk:Certification xsd:anyURI Compliance.jsonld
Certifying Body Name (dppk:certificationBodyName) The name of the body that issued the certification. dppk:Certification Compliance.jsonld
Certifying Body ID (dppk:certificationBodyId) The unique identifier of the certifying body. dppk:Certification xsd:string Compliance.jsonld
Start of Certificate Validity (dppk:certificationStartDate) The date when the certification became valid. dppk:Certification xsd:date Compliance.jsonld
End of Certificate Validity (dppk:certificationEndDate) The date when the certification expires. dppk:Certification xsd:date Compliance.jsonld
Certifying Body Role (dppk:certificationBodyRole) The role or capacity in which the certifying body issued the certification. dppk:Certification dppk:CertificationBodyRoleType Compliance.jsonld
Packaging Material Type (dppk:packagingMaterialType) The type of material used for the packaging (e.g., 'Cardboard', 'Plastic'). dppk:Packaging Compliance.jsonld
Packaging Material Composition Quantity (dppk:packagingMaterialCompositionQuantity) The percentage of the material in the packaging. dppk:Packaging Compliance.jsonld
Packaging Recycling Process Type (dppk:packagingRecyclingProcessType) Indicates if the packaging is RECYCLABLE, REUSABLE, or COMPOSTABLE. dppk:Packaging Compliance.jsonld
Packaging Recycled Content (dppk:packagingRecycledContent) The percentage of recycled content in the packaging material. dppk:Packaging Compliance.jsonld
Packaging Substance of Concern Present (dppk:packagingSubstanceOfConcern) Indicates if any substances of concern are present in the packaging. dppk:Packaging Compliance.jsonld
Production Step Type (dppk:productionStepType) The name or description of the production step (e.g., Assembly, Weaving, Smelting). dppk:ProductionStep Compliance.jsonld
Production Location Country (dppk:productionLocationCountry) The country where the production step took place. Recommended to use ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes. dppk:ProductionStep Compliance.jsonld
Biogenic carbon content in product (dppk-epd:biogCProduct) Biogenic carbon content in product dppk:EPDBlock xsd:double EPD.jsonld
Biogenic carbon content in accompanying packaging (dppk-epd:biogCPackaging) Biogenic carbon content in accompanying packaging dppk:EPDBlock xsd:double EPD.jsonld
The Declaration of Performance and Conformity. (dppk:dopc) The Declaration of Performance and Conformity. dppk:DoPCBlock DoPC.jsonld
Declaration Code (dppk-dopc:declarationCode) Unique identifier of the declaration. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Date of Issue (dppk-dopc:dateOfIssue) The date the declaration was issued. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:date DoPC.jsonld
Chloride Content Group (dppk-dopc:chlorideContent) Group of properties regarding chloride content. DoPC.jsonld
21°C (dppk-dopc:21DegC) A standardized temperature for some measurements. DoPC.jsonld
Bond Strength Group (dppk-dopc:bondStrength) Group of properties regarding bond strength. DoPC.jsonld
28 Days (dppk-dopc:28Days) A standardized interval for long term bond strength. DoPC.jsonld
Thermal Compatibility Group (dppk-dopc:thermalCompatibility) Group of properties regarding thermal compatibility. DoPC.jsonld
Wet Surface (dppk-dopc:wetSurface) A test condition for dry/wet comparisions. DoPC.jsonld
Carbonation Resistance Group (dppk-dopc:resistanceToCarbonation) Group of properties regarding carbonation resistance. DoPC.jsonld
Reaction to Fire Group (dppk-dopc:reactionToFire) Group of properties regarding reaction to fire. DoPC.jsonld
AVCP System 1 (dppk-dopc:avcpSystem1) System 1 for measuring reaction to fire. DoPC.jsonld
AVCP System 2 (dppk-dopc:avcpSystem2) System 2 for measuring reaction to fire. DoPC.jsonld
AVCP System 3 (dppk-dopc:avcpSystem3) System 3 for measuring reaction to fire. DoPC.jsonld
AVCP System 4 (dppk-dopc:avcpSystem4) System 4 for measuring reaction to fire. DoPC.jsonld
Elastic Recovery Group (dppk-dopc:elasticRecovery) Group of properties regarding elastic recovery. DoPC.jsonld
Method A (dppk-dopc:methodA) Reference to Method A. DoPC.jsonld
Method B (dppk-dopc:methodB) Reference to Method B. DoPC.jsonld
25% (dppk-dopc:25Percent) A standardized expansion factor to be recovered from in elastic material testing. DoPC.jsonld
60% (dppk-dopc:60Percent) A standardized expansion factor to be recovered from in elastic material testing. DoPC.jsonld
100% (dppk-dopc:100Percent) A standardized expansion factor to be recovered from in elastic material testing. DoPC.jsonld
Resistance to Flow Group (dppk-dopc:resistanceToFlow) Group of properties regarding resistance to flow. DoPC.jsonld
For measurements taken at 5°C (dppk-dopc:5DegC) A standardized temperature for resistance to flow testing. DoPC.jsonld
For measurements taken at 50°C (dppk-dopc:50DegC) A standardized temperature for resistance to flow testing. DoPC.jsonld
For measurements taken at 70°C (dppk-dopc:70DegC) A standardized temperature for resistance to flow testing. DoPC.jsonld
Flow Resistance (Proc A, 5°C) (dppk-dopc:flowResistanceProcedureA5) Flow resistance measured using Procedure A at 5°C. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Flow Resistance (Proc A, 70°C) (dppk-dopc:flowResistanceProcedureA70) Flow resistance measured using Procedure A at 70°C. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Flow Resistance (Proc B, 5°C) (dppk-dopc:flowResistanceProcedureB5) Flow resistance measured using Procedure B at 5°C. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Flow Resistance (Proc B, 50°C) (dppk-dopc:flowResistanceProcedureB50) Flow resistance measured using Procedure B at 50°C. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Flow Resistance (Proc B, 70°C) (dppk-dopc:flowResistanceProcedureB70) Flow resistance measured using Procedure B at 70°C. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Procedure A (dppk-dopc:procedureA) Reference to Procedure A. DoPC.jsonld
Procedure B (dppk-dopc:procedureB) Reference to Procedure B. DoPC.jsonld
Shrinkage and Expansion (dppk-dopc:shrinkageAndExpansion) The shrinkage and expansion of the material. xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Slip/Skid Resistance Group (dppk-dopc:slipSkidResistance) Group of properties regarding slip/skid resistance. DoPC.jsonld
Slip/Skid Resistance (Laboratory) (dppk-dopc:slipSkidResistanceLab) Measurements in the laboratory. xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Laboratory Measurement (dppk-dopc:laboratory) Condition indicating measurements taken in a laboratory setting. DoPC.jsonld
Modulus of Elasticity Group (dppk-dopc:modulusOfElasticityInCompression) Group of properties regarding modulus of elasticity in compression. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Modulus of Elasticity (Method 1) (dppk-dopc:modulusMethod1) Modulus of elasticity measured using Method 1. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Method 1 (dppk-dopc:method1) A reference to Method 1 for measuring modulus of elasticity. DoPC.jsonld
Thermal Expansion (dppk-dopc:thermalExpansion) Change in volume in response to a change in temperature. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Declared Unit (dppk-dopc:declaredUnit) The quantity of a construction product for use as a reference unit in an EPD for an environmental impact assessment. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Functional Unit (dppk-dopc:functionalUnit) The quantified performance of a product system for use as a reference unit. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Chloride Content (21°C) (dppk-dopc:chlorideContentAt21DegC) Maximum percentage by mass. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Bond Strength (28 Days) (dppk-dopc:bondStrengthAt28Days) Bond strength measured after 28 days. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Thermal Compatibility (Wet Surface) (dppk-dopc:thermalCompatibilityWet) Thermal compatibility measured on wet surface. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Resistance to Carbonation (21°C) (dppk-dopc:carbonationResistanceAt21DegC) Resistance to carbonation at 21 degrees Celsius. xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Reaction to Fire (AVCP System 1) (dppk-dopc:reactionToFireSystem1) Reaction to fire under AVCP System 1. xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Reaction to Fire (AVCP System 2) (dppk-dopc:reactionToFireSystem2) Reaction to fire under AVCP System 2. xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Reaction to Fire (AVCP System 3) (dppk-dopc:reactionToFireSystem3) Reaction to fire under AVCP System 3. xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Reaction to Fire (AVCP System 4) (dppk-dopc:reactionToFireSystem4) Reaction to fire under AVCP System 4. xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Elastic Recovery (Method A, 25% Elongation) (dppk-dopc:elasticRecoveryMethodA25) Elastic recovery using Method A at 25% elongation. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Elastic Recovery (Method A, 60% Elongation) (dppk-dopc:elasticRecoveryMethodA60) Elastic recovery using Method A at 60% elongation. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Elastic Recovery (Method A, 100% Elongation) (dppk-dopc:elasticRecoveryMethodA100) Elastic recovery using Method A at 100% elongation. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Elastic Recovery (Method B, 25% Elongation) (dppk-dopc:elasticRecoveryMethodB25) Elastic recovery using Method B at 25% elongation. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Elastic Recovery (Method B, 60% Elongation) (dppk-dopc:elasticRecoveryMethodB60) Elastic recovery using Method B at 60% elongation. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Elastic Recovery (Method B, 100% Elongation) (dppk-dopc:elasticRecoveryMethodB100) Elastic recovery using Method B at 100% elongation. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Flow Resistance (Proc A, 50°C) (dppk-dopc:flowResistanceProcedureA50) Resistance to flow using Procedure A at 50 degrees Celsius. xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Adhesion Class (dppk-dopc:tensileStrengthAdhesion) Classification of adhesion. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:string DoPC.jsonld
Capillary Absorption (dppk-dopc:capillaryAbsorption) Capillary absorption rate. dppk:DoPCBlock xsd:double DoPC.jsonld
Dangerous Substances (dppk-dopc:dangerousSubstance) Statement on dangerous substances. dppk:DoPCBlock dppk-dopc:DangerousSubstanceComponent DoPC.jsonld
Reference Service Life (dppk-dopc:referenceServiceLife) The reference service life in years. xsd:integer DoPC.jsonld
Indicator (dppk-epd:indicator) A generic property representing an environmental impact indicator. dppk:EPDBlock EPDIndicators.jsonld

C1: Deconstruction / Demolition (dppk-epd:c1) Downstream C1 (Deconstruction) dppk:ImpactValues xsd:double EPDLifecycle.jsonld
C2: Transport (dppk-epd:c2) Downstream C2 (Transport to Waste Processing) dppk:ImpactValues xsd:double EPDLifecycle.jsonld
C3: Waste processing (dppk-epd:c3) Downstream C3 (Waste Processing) dppk:ImpactValues xsd:double EPDLifecycle.jsonld
C4: Disposal (dppk-epd:c4) Downstream C4 (Disposal) dppk:ImpactValues xsd:double EPDLifecycle.jsonld
D: Reuse, recovery, recycling potential (dppk-epd:d) Reuse, recovery, recycling potential dppk:ImpactValues xsd:double EPDLifecycle.jsonld
Total (dppk-epd:total) Total dppk:ImpactValues xsd:double EPDLifecycle.jsonld
Environmental Product Declaration (dppk:epd) A dictionary of environmental impact indicators and their values across different life cycle stages. dppk:Product dppk:EPDBlock EPDMetadata.jsonld
DPP Identifier (dppk:digitalProductPassportId) The unique identifier for this specific Digital Product Passport instance. Should be a persistent, globally unique, and resolvable URI (e.g., URN UUID or HTTP URI). Implementation-specific identifier. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:anyURI Header.jsonld
Unique Product Identifier (UPI) (dppk:uniqueProductIdentifier) The globally resolvable URI for the product/DPP. dppk:Component, dppk:DigitalProductPassport, dppk:Product xsd:anyURI Header.jsonld
Economic Operator Identifier (EOI) (dppk:economicOperatorId) The unique identifier for the Economic Operator responsible for placing the product on the market. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:anyURI Header.jsonld
Facility Identifier (dppk:facilityId) Optional. The unique identifier for the manufacturing or processing facility associated with the product. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:anyURI Header.jsonld
Granularity Level (dppk:granularity) Describes the level to which the Digital Product Passport (DPP) applies: a Model (product type), a Batch (production lot), or an Item (an individually serialized product). dppk:DigitalProductPassport dppk:GranularityValue Header.jsonld
DPP Status (dppk:dppStatus) The current lifecycle status of the DPP instance (e.g., 'active', 'inactive'). dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:string Header.jsonld
Last Update Timestamp (dppk:lastUpdate) The date and time when the DPP instance was last modified. Must be in ISO 8601 format (xsd:dateTime). dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:dateTime Header.jsonld
Version Number (dppk:versionNumber) The version number of the DPP instance. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:string Header.jsonld
Version Date (dppk:versionDate) The date of the version of the DPP instance. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:date Header.jsonld
DPP Schema Version (dppk:dppSchemaVersion) The version of the horizontal (cross-sector) DPP schema used for this instance. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:string Header.jsonld
Content Specification Identifiers (dppk:contentSpecificationIds) A set of identifiers for the delegated acts or sector-specific data models this DPP conforms to. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:string Header.jsonld
Harmonized System Code (HS Code) or TARIC (dppk:hsCode) The customs tariff number (e.g., HS Code, TARIC code) used for international trade classification. dppk:DigitalProductPassport xsd:string Header.jsonld
Unit of Measurement (dppk:unit) The unit of measurement. dppk:Unit Header.jsonld
Economic Operator (dppk:economicOperator) Relates the DPP to the Economic Operator responsible for it. dppk:DigitalProductPassport dppk:Organization Organization.jsonld
Manufacturer (dppk:manufacturer) Relates the DPP to the Manufacturer of the product. dppk:DigitalProductPassport dppk:Organization Organization.jsonld
Importer (dppk:importer) Relates the DPP to the Importer of the product. dppk:DigitalProductPassport dppk:Organization Organization.jsonld
Manufacturing Facility (dppk:manufacturingFacility) Relates the DPP to the specific facility where the product (or a step) was manufactured. dppk:DigitalProductPassport dppk:Organization Organization.jsonld
Repair Service (dppk:repairService) Relates the DPP to an authorized repair service. dppk:DigitalProductPassport dppk:Organization Organization.jsonld
Organization Name (dppk:organizationName) The official legal name of the organization. dppk:Organization xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Trading Name (dppk:tradingName) The name under which the organization conducts business, if different from the legal name. dppk:Organization xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Global Location Number (GLN) (dppk:gln) A GS1 standard identifier for legal entities, functional departments, or physical locations. dppk:Organization xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) (dppk:leiCode) A standardized global identifier for legal entities. dppk:Organization xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Economic Operators Registration and Identification (EORI) (dppk:eori) A unique identifier assigned by a customs authority in the EU to economic operators. dppk:Organization xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Additional Organization ID (dppk:additionalOrganizationId) An identifier for the organization other than GLN or LEI (e.g., EORI, VAT ID). Must be used in conjunction with additionalOrganizationIdType. dppk:Organization xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Additional Organization ID Type (dppk:additionalOrganizationIdType) The type of the identifier provided in additionalOrganizationId (e.g., 'EORI', 'VAT'). dppk:Organization xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Address (dppk:address) Relates an organization to its physical address. dppk:Organization dppk:PostalAddress Organization.jsonld
Street Address (dppk:streetAddress) Includes street name and number. dppk:PostalAddress Organization.jsonld
Postal Code (dppk:postalCode) The postal code of the location. dppk:PostalAddress Organization.jsonld
City/Locality (dppk:addressLocality) The locality (e.g. city) of the address. dppk:PostalAddress Organization.jsonld
Country (dppk:addressCountry) The country component of the address. dppk:PostalAddress Organization.jsonld
Email Address (dppk:email) The email address for contacting the organization. dppk:Organization Organization.jsonld
Telephone Number (dppk:telephone) The telephone number for contacting the organization. dppk:Organization Organization.jsonld
Operator Email Address (dppk:operatorEmail) The email address for contacting the economic operator. dppk:EconomicOperatorRole xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Operator Telephone Number (dppk:operatorTelephone) The telephone number for contacting the economic operator. dppk:EconomicOperatorRole xsd:string Organization.jsonld
Website (dppk:website) The URL of the organization's website. dppk:Organization xsd:anyURI Organization.jsonld
The Material Test Certificate. (dppk:mtc) A link to the Material Test Certificate associated with this product. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate MTC.jsonld
Source Document (dppk:sourceDocument) A reference to the original digital document or file representing this certificate. dppk:RelatedResource MTC.jsonld
Nominal Size (dppk:mtcNominalSize) Nominal dimensional size of the steel product. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Weight Tolerance (dppk:mtcWeightTolerance) Tolerated deviation in weight as per EN 10168. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Yield Strength (dppk:mtcYieldStrength) Yield strength parameter from the Mill Test Certificate. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Yield Strength Ratio (dppk:mtcYieldStrengthRatio) Ratio of yield strength to tensile strength (Re/Rm). dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Elongation (dppk:mtcElongation) Percentage elongation at fracture. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Relative Rib Area (dppk:mtcRelativeRibArea) Relative rib area on reinforcing steel products. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Carbon Content (dppk:mtcCarbonContent) Carbon (C) content percentage defined in the MTC. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Phosphorus Content (dppk:mtcPhosphorusContent) Phosphorus (P) content percentage. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Sulfur Content (dppk:mtcSulfurContent) Sulfur (S) content percentage. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Copper Content (dppk:mtcCopperContent) Copper (Cu) content percentage. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Nitrogen Content (dppk:mtcNitrogenContent) Nitrogen (N) content percentage. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Carbon Equivalent (dppk:mtcCarbonEquivalent) Carbon equivalent value (CEV) for assessing weldability. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Steel Process (dppk:mtcSteelProcess) Details of the steelmaking or casting process. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:string MTC.jsonld
Finishing (dppk:mtcFinishing) Information regarding the surface finish or condition. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:string MTC.jsonld
Radiometric Control (dppk:mtcRadiometricControl) Values associated with radiometric testing of the steel. dppk:MaterialTestCertificate xsd:double MTC.jsonld
Identifier (dppk:identifier) A generic identifier for a resource. It is equivalent to schema:identifier. xsd:string Identifier.jsonld
Component Name (dppk:componentName) The specific name of the component. dppk:Component rdf:langString Product.jsonld
Component Percentage (dppk:componentPercentage) The percentage contribution of this component to the parent assembly (e.g., by weight). dppk:Component xsd:double Product.jsonld
Component Identifier (dppk:componentIdentifier) The unique product identifier of the component. dppk:Component xsd:string Product.jsonld
Component CAS Number (dppk:componentCasNumber) The Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) registry number for the component. dppk:Component xsd:string Product.jsonld
Component EC Number (dppk:componentEcNumber) The European Community (EC) number for the component. dppk:Component xsd:string Product.jsonld
Component IUPAC Name (dppk:componentIupacName) The International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry nomenclature for the component. dppk:Component xsd:string Product.jsonld
Component Location in Product (dppk:componentLocationInProduct) Specific physical location of the component or substance inside the parent assembly. dppk:Component xsd:string Product.jsonld
Name (dppk:name) A generic name or title for a resource (e.g., a document title). For the name of a product, prefer the more specific 'dppk:productName'. rdf:langString Product.jsonld
Product Name (dppk:productName) The common name of the product. dppk:Product rdf:langString Product.jsonld
Product Description (dppk:description) A detailed description of the product. dppk:Product rdf:langString Product.jsonld
Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) (dppk:gtin) The GS1 identifier for the trade item. dppk:Product xsd:string Product.jsonld
Brand Name (dppk:brand) The brand name of the product. dppk:Product xsd:string Product.jsonld
Model Number (dppk:model) The model identifier or number of the product. dppk:Product xsd:string Product.jsonld
Product Image (dppk:image) A reference to an image resource related to the product. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource Product.jsonld
Color Description (dppk:color) The color of the product. dppk:Product rdf:langString Product.jsonld
Components (dppk:components) A constituent part or material of the product. dppk:Product dppk:Component Product.jsonld
Country of Origin (dppk:countryOfOrigin) The country where the product or material was manufactured or produced. Recommended to use ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes. dppk:Product xsd:string Product.jsonld
Recycled Content Percentage (dppk:recycledContentPercentage) The percentage of the material that is derived from recycled sources. dppk:Product xsd:double Product.jsonld
Net Weight (dppk:netWeight) The weight of the product or material, excluding packaging. Recommended to use specific datatypes like dppk:KgWeightLiteral. dppk:Product dppk:KgWeightLiteral Product.jsonld
Gross Weight (dppk:grossWeight) The weight of the product or material, including packaging, expressed as a QuantitativeValue. dppk:Product dppk:KgWeightLiteral Product.jsonld
Length (dppk:length) The length of the product or material. Recommended to use specific datatypes like dppk:MetersLengthLiteral. dppk:Product dppk:MetersLengthLiteral Product.jsonld
Width (dppk:width) The width of the product or material. Recommended to use specific datatypes like dppk:MetersLengthLiteral. dppk:Product dppk:MetersLengthLiteral Product.jsonld
Height (dppk:height) The height of the product or material. Recommended to use specific datatypes like dppk:MetersLengthLiteral. dppk:Product dppk:MetersLengthLiteral Product.jsonld
Depth (dppk:depth) The depth of the product or material. Recommended to use specific datatypes like dppk:MetersLengthLiteral. dppk:Product dppk:MetersLengthLiteral Product.jsonld
Value (dppk:value) The numeric value of the measurement. dppk:QuantitativeValue xsd:double Product.jsonld
Unit Code (dppk:unitCode) The unit of measurement, preferably using UN/CEFACT codes (e.g., KGM, MTR, LTR). dppk:QuantitativeValue xsd:string Product.jsonld
Unit Text (dppk:unitText) A human-readable representation of the unit (e.g., kg CO2e, Nm). dppk:QuantitativeValue xsd:string Product.jsonld
Product Characteristics (dppk:productCharacteristics) Relates a product to its specific characteristics or performance properties. dppk:Product dppk:ProductCharacteristic Product.jsonld
Characteristic Name (dppk:characteristicName) The name of the characteristic being described (e.g., 'Bond strength', 'Reaction to fire'). dppk:ProductCharacteristic xsd:string Product.jsonld
Characteristic Value (dppk:characteristicValue) The measured or declared value of the characteristic (e.g., '≥ 2.0 MPa', 'Class A1'). dppk:ProductCharacteristic xsd:string Product.jsonld
Test Method (dppk:testMethod) A reference to the standard or methodology used to determine the characteristic's value. dppk:ProductCharacteristic xsd:string Product.jsonld
Warranty Duration (dppk:warrantyDuration) The duration of the commercial warranty provided with the product. dppk:Product xsd:string Product.jsonld
Apparel Size (dppk:apparelSize) The size of the product (e.g., 'M', 'L', '42'). Applicable primarily to apparel and textiles. dppk:Product xsd:string Product.jsonld
Apparel Size System (dppk:apparelSizeSystem) The sizing system used for the apparel size (e.g., 'EU', 'US', 'UK'). dppk:Product xsd:string Product.jsonld
Resource Title (dppk:resourceTitle) The title of the related resource. dppk:RelatedResource xsd:string RelatedResource.jsonld
Content Type (dppk:contentType) The media type (MIME type) of the resource (e.g., 'application/pdf', 'image/jpeg'). dppk:RelatedResource xsd:string RelatedResource.jsonld
Language (dppk:language) The language of the resource content (e.g., 'en', 'fr'). dppk:RelatedResource xsd:string RelatedResource.jsonld
URL (dppk:url) The location of the resource. dppk:RelatedResource xsd:anyURI RelatedResource.jsonld
Instructions for Use (dppk:instructionsForUse) A link to the instructions for use or user manual for the product. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource RelatedResource.jsonld
Safety Data Sheet (dppk:safetyDataSheet) A link to the safety data sheet (SDS) for the product. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource RelatedResource.jsonld
Safe Use Instructions (dppk:safeUseInstructions) Instructions and guidelines for the safe use and maintenance of the product. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource RelatedResource.jsonld
End of Life Instructions (dppk:endOfLifeInstructions) Instructions for the proper disassembly, recycling, or disposal of the product at the end of its life. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource RelatedResource.jsonld
Repair Instructions (dppk:repairInstructions) Instructions on how to repair or replace components of the product. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource RelatedResource.jsonld
Care Instructions (dppk:careInstructions) Instructions and manuals for the care, washing, and maintenance of the product. dppk:Product dppk:RelatedResource RelatedResource.jsonld
Place of Signature (dppk-signature:placeOfSignature) Place in which the signature took place. xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Signatory (dppk-signature:signatory) Name of the signatory. xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Signatory Position (dppk-signature:signatoryPosition) Position or function of the signatory. xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Date of Signature (dppk-signature:dateOfSignature) Date of the signature. xsd:date Signature.jsonld
Cryptographic Proof Object (dppk-signature:cryptographicProof) Link to the cryptographic digital signature of the document. dppk-signature:CryptographicProof Signature.jsonld
Signature Type (dppk-signature:signatureType) Element of the digital signature indicating its type. dppk-signature:CryptographicProof xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Signature Algorithm (dppk-signature:signatureAlgorithm) Algorithm used for the digital signature. dppk-signature:CryptographicProof xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Signature Canonicalization (dppk-signature:signatureCanonicalization) Canonicalization method used prior to signing. dppk-signature:CryptographicProof xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Signature Key ID (dppk-signature:signatureKeyId) Identifier for the key used to sign. dppk-signature:CryptographicProof xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Signature Created (dppk-signature:signatureCreated) Timestamp when the signature was created. dppk-signature:CryptographicProof xsd:dateTime Signature.jsonld
Signature Value (dppk-signature:signatureValue) The actual string value of the digital signature. xsd:string Signature.jsonld
Unit Symbol (dppk:unitSymbol) The raw string representation or symbol of the unit. dppk:Unit xsd:string Unit.jsonld
Harmonised European Standard (hEN) (dppk:harmonisedStandardReference) A reference (URI or identifier) to the applicable Harmonised European Standard (hEN) used for assessing the product. dppk:ConstructionProduct xsd:anyURI Construction.jsonld
Notified Body (NB) Details (dppk:notifiedBody) The EU-recognized notified body that verifies a product's conformance to European regulations dppk:ConstructionProduct dppk:Organization Construction.jsonld
Technical Assessment Body (TAB) Details (dppk:technicalAssessmentBody) The technical assessment body that independently evaluates a product's technical characteristics dppk:ConstructionProduct dppk:Organization Construction.jsonld
Validation Reports Reference (dppk:validationReports) Reference to reports validating the performance or conformity of the product. dppk:ConstructionProduct dppk:RelatedResource Construction.jsonld
European Assessment Document (EAD) Reference (dppk:europeanAssessmentDocument) A reference to the European Assessment Document (EAD) relevant to the product. dppk:ConstructionProduct dppk:RelatedResource Construction.jsonld
Thermal Conductivity (Lambda) (dppk:thermalConductivity) The property of a material to conduct heat. dppk:ConstructionProduct dppk:QuantitativeValue Construction.jsonld
Compressive Strength (dppk:compressiveStrength) The capacity of a material or structure to withstand loads tending to reduce size. dppk:ConstructionProduct dppk:QuantitativeValue Construction.jsonld
Steel Grade (dppk:steelGrade) The classification of the steel based on its composition and physical properties (e.g., R260, S355). dppk:Product xsd:string Construction.jsonld
Rail Profile (dppk:railProfile) The standardized cross-section design of a railway rail (e.g., 46E1). dppk:Product xsd:string Construction.jsonld
EU Apparel Size (dppk:euApparelSize) The structured EU specific size of the product based on body dimensions (e.g., EN 13402). dppk:Product dppk:EuApparelSizeObject EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Size Designation (dppk:sizeDesignation) Identification of the clothing size by means of alphanumeric characters. dppk:EuApparelSizeObject xsd:string EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Cup Size (dppk:cupSize) Difference between bust girth and underbust girth. dppk:EuApparelSizeObject xsd:string EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Primary Dimension (dppk:primaryDimension) The primary body measurement (e.g., chest girth). dppk:EuApparelSizeObject dppk:BodyDimensionValue EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Primary Dimension Value (dppk:primaryDimensionValue) The range or value of the primary dimension. dppk:EuApparelSizeObject xsd:string EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Secondary Dimensions (dppk:secondaryDimensions) Additional body measurements required for precision fit. dppk:EuApparelSizeObject EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Dimension Name (dppk:dimensionName) The name of the secondary dimension (e.g., waist girth). dppk:BodyDimensionValue EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Dimension Value (dppk:dimensionValue) The value or range of the secondary dimension. xsd:string EUApparelSizeSystem.jsonld
Heat Number (dppk:heatNumber) The heat number for iron and steel to serve as a lot-level identifier. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Product Number (dppk:productNumber) An internal identifier at the article level. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Manufacturing Date (dppk:manufacturingDate) The date on which the product was manufactured. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:date IronSteel.jsonld
Cast Number (dppk:castNumber) Optional batch-level identifier representing the specific cast. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Lot Number (dppk:lotNumber) Optional batch-level identifier representing the specific manufacturing lot. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Purchaser Order (dppk:purchaserOrder) Associated purchase order identifier. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Steel Grade Classification (dppk:steelGradeClassification) The classification of the steel grade. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Steel Designation (dppk:steelDesignation) The specific designation or name of the steel. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Technology Route (dppk:technologyRoute) The primary manufacturing route (e.g. EAF, BF-BOF). dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Melt and Pour Country (dppk:meltAndPourCountry) The country where the steel was originally melted and poured. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
Recycled Content Percentage (dppk:recycledContentPercentage) Total recycled content percentage in the steel. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:double IronSteel.jsonld
Pre-Consumer Recycled Content (dppk:preConsumerRecycledContent) Percentage of pre-consumer recycled material. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:double IronSteel.jsonld
Post-Consumer Recycled Content (dppk:postConsumerRecycledContent) Percentage of post-consumer recycled material. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:double IronSteel.jsonld
Recycled Content Conformity (dppk:recycledContentConformity) Reference or URI to the conformity declaration of the recycled content calculation. dppk:IronSteelProduct IronSteel.jsonld
CBAM Report ID (dppk:cbamReportId) Identifier for the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) report. dppk:IronSteelProduct xsd:string IronSteel.jsonld
REACH Documentation (dppk:reachDocumentation) URI link to the REACH regulatory documentation if applicable. dppk:IronSteelProduct dppk:RelatedResource IronSteel.jsonld
Voltage (dppk:voltage) The electric potential difference, typically measured in Volts (V). dppk:ElectronicDevice dppk:QuantitativeValue Electronics.jsonld
Rated Power (Wattage) (dppk:ratedPower) The power consumption of the device under normal operating conditions, typically measured in Watts (W). dppk:ElectronicDevice dppk:QuantitativeValue Electronics.jsonld
Energy Efficiency Class (dppk:energyEfficiencyClass) The energy efficiency rating as defined by the EU Energy Labelling framework (e.g., A, B, C). dppk:ElectronicDevice xsd:string Electronics.jsonld
Ingress Protection (IP) Rating (dppk:ipRating) Defines levels of sealing effectiveness against intrusion from foreign bodies (tools, dirt) and moisture (e.g., IP54). dppk:ElectronicDevice xsd:string Electronics.jsonld
Spare Parts Availability (dppk:sparePartsAvailable) Indicates whether spare parts are available for the product. dppk:ElectronicDevice xsd:boolean Electronics.jsonld
Service Manual Availability (dppk:serviceManualAvailable) Indicates whether a service or repair manual is available. dppk:ElectronicDevice xsd:boolean Electronics.jsonld
Software Update Policy (dppk:softwareUpdatePolicy) Information on the duration and type of software/firmware updates provided by the manufacturer. dppk:ElectronicDevice rdf:langString Electronics.jsonld
WEEE Category (dppk:weeeCategory) The category under the Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment (WEEE) Directive. dppk:ElectronicDevice xsd:string Electronics.jsonld
Disassembly Instructions (dppk:disassemblyInstructions) Instructions for safely disassembling the product for repair or recycling. dppk:ElectronicDevice rdf:langString Electronics.jsonld
Torque (dppk:torque) The rotational force generated by the tool, typically measured in Newton-meters (Nm). dppk:PowerTool dppk:QuantitativeValue Electronics.jsonld
Maximum Rated Speed (dppk:maximumRatedSpeed) The maximum operating speed of the tool, typically measured in Revolutions Per Minute (RPM). dppk:PowerTool dppk:QuantitativeValue Electronics.jsonld
PEFCR Category (dppk:pefcrCategory) The Product Environmental Footprint Category Rules (PEFCR) category to which the product belongs. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:PefcrCategoryValue Textile.jsonld
Textile ESPR Conformity Certifications (dppk:textileCertifications) Certifications specifically verifying ESPR textile claims (e.g. recycled content, recyclability, mechanical properties). dppk:TextileProduct dppk:Certification Textile.jsonld
EU Declaration of Conformity (dppk:euDeclarationOfConformity) A reference to the EU Declaration of Conformity for the product. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:RelatedResource Textile.jsonld
Carbon Footprint (dppk:carbonFootprint) The carbon footprint of the product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Carbon Footprint Benchmark Percentage (dppk:carbonFootprintBenchmarkPercentage) The product's carbon footprint performance compared to the established benchmark, expressed as a percentage. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Carbon Footprint Class (dppk:carbonFootprintClass) The performance class of the product's carbon footprint. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:integer Textile.jsonld
Environmental Footprint (dppk:environmentalFootprint) The absolute value of the product's environmental footprint. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Environmental Footprint Benchmark Percentage (dppk:environmentalFootprintBenchmarkPercentage) The product's environmental footprint performance compared to the established benchmark, expressed as a percentage. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Environmental Footprint Class (dppk:environmentalFootprintClass) The performance class of the product's environmental footprint. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:integer Textile.jsonld
Textile Weight (dppk:textileWeight) The average final product weight including trims, in kilograms. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Carbon Footprint Calculation Parameters (dppk:carbonFootprintCalculationParameters) A reference to the document or resource describing the parameters used for the carbon footprint calculation. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:RelatedResource Textile.jsonld
Robustness Score (dppk:robustnessScore) A numeric score representing the product's robustness (typically 0-10 scale). dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Recyclability Score (dppk:recyclabilityScore) A numeric score representing the product's recyclability (typically 0-10 scale). dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Spirality (dppk:spirality) The measured spirality of the textile product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Dimensional Change (dppk:dimensionalChange) The dimensional change (shrinkage or expansion) after testing. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Visual Inspection Result (dppk:visualInspection) The result of the visual inspection (e.g. Pass/Fail or notes). dppk:TextileProduct xsd:string Textile.jsonld
Contains Non-Textile Parts of Animal Origin (dppk:animalOriginNonTextile) Indicates whether the product contains non-textile parts of animal origin, as required by the EU Textile Labelling Regulation. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:boolean Textile.jsonld
EU Ecolabel (dppk:euEcolabel) Indicates whether the product has been awarded the EU Ecolabel. The label should be found in the certifications array as well, if present. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:boolean Textile.jsonld
Weight Excluding Trims (dppk:weightExcludingTrims) The weight of the product excluding non-textile trims (e.g. buttons, zippers), used as a base for calculations. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Organic Content Percentage (dppk:organicContentPercentage) The percentage of organic material in the product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Organic Content Mass (dppk:organicContentMass) The absolute mass of organic material in the product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Pre-consumer Recycled Content (dppk:preConsumerRecycledContentPercentage) The percentage of pre-consumer recycled material in the product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Pre-consumer Recycled Content Mass (dppk:preConsumerRecycledContentMass) The absolute mass of pre-consumer recycled material in the product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Pre-consumer Type of Waste (dppk:preConsumerTypeOfWaste) The classification or source of the pre-consumer waste used for recycled content. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:string Textile.jsonld
Post-consumer Recycled Content (dppk:postConsumerRecycledContentPercentage) The percentage of post-consumer recycled material in the product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Post-consumer Recycled Content Mass (dppk:postConsumerRecycledContentMass) The absolute mass of post-consumer recycled material in the product. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:double Textile.jsonld
Post-consumer Type of Waste (dppk:postConsumerTypeOfWaste) The classification or source of the post-consumer waste used for recycled content. dppk:TextileProduct xsd:string Textile.jsonld
Production Steps (dppk:productionSteps) The sequence of major production steps that occurred for this product. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:ProductionStep Textile.jsonld
Production Step Type (dppk:productionStepType) The type of activity performed (e.g., Spinning, Weaving, Dyeing). dppk:ProductionStep xsd:string Textile.jsonld
Production Location Country (dppk:productionLocationCountry) The country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) where the production step took place. dppk:ProductionStep xsd:string Textile.jsonld
Textile Care Instructions (dppk:textileCareInstructions) Instructions and manuals for the care, washing, and maintenance of the textile product. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:RelatedResource Textile.jsonld
Textile Safe Use Instructions (dppk:textileSafeUseInstructions) Instructions and guidelines for the safe use and maintenance of the textile product. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:RelatedResource Textile.jsonld
Textile End of Life Instructions (dppk:textileEndOfLifeInstructions) Instructions for the proper disassembly, recycling, or disposal of the textile product at the end of its life. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:RelatedResource Textile.jsonld
Textile Repair Instructions (dppk:textileRepairInstructions) Instructions on how to repair or replace components of the textile product. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:RelatedResource Textile.jsonld
Fibre Composition (dppk:fibreComposition) Relates the textile product to its constituent fibres and their proportions. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:Component Textile.jsonld
Textile Substances of Concern (dppk:textileSubstancesOfConcern) Substances of concern present in the textile product. dppk:TextileProduct dppk:Component Textile.jsonld
Manufacturing place (dppk:manufacturingPlace) A battery passport must include the manufacturing place (geographical location of a battery manufacturing plant). The manufacturing place must also be provided on the battery label. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Manufacturing date (dppk:manufacturingDate) A battery passport must include the date of manufacture (month and year). The manufacturing date must also be provided on the battery label. Format YYYY-MM-DD (ISO 8601). dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:date Battery.jsonld
Date of putting the battery into service (dppk:serviceDate) Where appropriate, the battery passport must include information on the date of putting the battery into service. Format YYYY-MM-DD (ISO 8601). dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:date Battery.jsonld
Warranty period of the battery (dppk:warrantyPeriod) The battery passport must include information about the period for which the commercial warranty applies. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Battery category (dppk:batteryCategory) A battery passport must include the battery category. The battery category must be provided on the battery label. Categories: LMT battery, electric vehicle battery, or industrial battery. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Battery mass (dppk:batteryMass) A battery passport must include the battery mass. The battery mass must also be provided on the battery label. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Battery status (dppk:batteryStatus) A battery passport must include information on the status of the battery. Statuses: original, repurposed, re-used, remanufactured, or waste. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Separate collection symbol (dppk:separateCollectionSymbol) The battery passport must include the symbol for separate collection. The symbol should be translated into text to ensure machine readability. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Symbols for cadmium and lead (dppk:heavyMetalSymbols) Batteries containing more than 0.002% cadmium or 0.004% lead must be marked with the chemical symbol (Cd or Pb). dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Carbon footprint label (dppk:carbonFootprintLabel) EV and rechargeable industrial batteries > 2 kWh and LMT batteries must bear a label indicating the carbon footprint and performance class. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Extinguishing agent (dppk:extinguishingAgent) A battery passport must include the usable extinguishing agent. The information should be related to their possible area of application as regulated in DIN EN 2. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Meaning of labels and symbols (dppk:labelMeaning) Information regarding the prevention and management of waste batteries including the meaning of the labels and symbols. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Results of test reports proving compliance (dppk:testReports) A battery passport must include the test report results that can prove the compliance with the requirements stated in the battery regulation. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Carbon footprint performance class (dppk:carbonFootprintClass) The battery passport must include the carbon footprint performance class in accordance with the delegated and implementing acts. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Web link to public carbon footprint study (dppk:carbonFootprintStudy) The battery passport must include a web link to the carbon footprint study accompanying the battery carbon footprint declaration. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
General battery and manufacturer information (dppk:carbonFootprintGeneralInfo) The battery passport must contain general battery and manufacturer information in relation to the battery carbon footprint. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Absolute battery carbon footprint (dppk:carbonFootprintAbsolute) The battery passport should include the battery carbon footprint in absolute terms (kg CO2e). dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Information of due diligence report (dppk:dueDiligenceReport) The battery passport must include information on responsible sourcing as indicated in the report on its due diligence policy. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Third party assurances of recognised schemes (dppk:supplyChainAssurances) The battery passport should contain information on third-party supply chain assurances such as certifications. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Supply chain indices (dppk:supplyChainIndices) The battery passport should contain supply chain indices to allow easy assessment for consumers on level of responsible sourcing. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Battery chemistry (dppk:batteryChemistry) The battery passport must contain information on the battery chemistry (cathode, anode, electrolyte). dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Critical raw materials (dppk:criticalRawMaterials) The battery passport must contain information on the critical raw materials present in the battery in a concentration of more than 0.1%. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Materials used in cathode, anode and electrolyte (dppk:materialComposition) The battery passport must contain information on the detailed composition of the battery, including materials used in the cathode, anode and electrolyte. Reuses dppk:Component. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:Component Battery.jsonld
Hazardous substances (dppk:hazardousSubstances) The battery passport must contain information on hazardous substances other than mercury, cadmium, or lead. Reuses dppk:Component. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:Component Battery.jsonld
Impact of substances on environment, human health, safety, persons (dppk:hazardousSubstancesImpact) The battery passport must contain information on the impact of substances, in particular hazardous substances, on the environment and human health. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:string Battery.jsonld
Dismantling information (dppk:dismantlingInformation) A battery passport must include dismantling information, including exploded diagrams, disassembly sequences, and tools required. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Part numbers for components (dppk:partNumbers) A battery passport must include part numbers for components, provided together with contact details of sources for spare parts. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Information on sources of spare parts (dppk:sparePartsSources) A battery passport must include contact details of sources for spare parts. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Safety measures (dppk:safetyMeasures) A battery passport must include safety measures, provided via the instruction manual. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Information on waste prevention and management (dppk:wastePreventionInfo) Information on the role of end-users in waste prevention, separate collection, and information on battery collection and treatment. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:RelatedResource Battery.jsonld
Pre-consumer recycled material shares (dppk:preConsumerRecycledMaterialComposition) The percentage shares of Nickel, Cobalt, Lithium, and Lead recovered from battery manufacturing waste (pre-consumer). dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:Component Battery.jsonld
Post-consumer recycled material shares (dppk:postConsumerRecycledMaterialComposition) The percentage shares of Nickel, Cobalt, Lithium, and Lead recovered from waste (post-consumer). dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:Component Battery.jsonld
Renewable content share (dppk:renewableContent) A battery passport must include information about the share of renewable content. dppk:BatteryProduct xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Performance and durability parameters (dppk:performance) A battery passport must include information on the performance and durability of the battery. dppk:BatteryProduct dppk:BatteryPerformance Battery.jsonld
Capacity, energy, and voltage (dppk:capacity) Sub-section for capacity, energy, state of charge, and voltage limits. dppk:BatteryPerformance dppk:CapacityInfo Battery.jsonld
Power capability (dppk:power) Sub-section for power capability, fade, and limits. dppk:BatteryPerformance dppk:PowerInfo Battery.jsonld
Round trip energy efficiency and self-discharge (dppk:efficiency) Sub-section for round trip efficiency and self-discharge. dppk:BatteryPerformance dppk:EfficiencyInfo Battery.jsonld
Internal resistance (dppk:internalResistance) Sub-section for internal resistance. dppk:BatteryPerformance dppk:InternalResistanceInfo Battery.jsonld
Battery lifetime (dppk:lifetime) Sub-section for battery lifetime in years and cycles. dppk:BatteryPerformance dppk:LifetimeInfo Battery.jsonld
Temperature conditions (dppk:temperature) Sub-section for temperature conditions and time in extreme temperatures. dppk:BatteryPerformance dppk:TemperatureInfo Battery.jsonld
Negative events and accidents (dppk:negativeEvents) Sub-section for negative events and accidents. dppk:BatteryPerformance dppk:NegativeEventsInfo Battery.jsonld
Rated capacity (dppk:ratedCapacity) The total number of ampere-hours (Ah) that can be withdrawn from a fully charged battery under reference conditions. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Remaining capacity (dppk:remainingCapacity) The corresponding in-use data attribute to rated capacity, as information on the state of health of the battery. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Capacity fade (dppk:capacityFade) The decrease over time and upon usage in the amount of charge that a battery can deliver at the rated voltage, with respect to the original rated capacity. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Certified usable battery energy (dppk:certifiedUsableEnergy) The usable battery energy according to the procedure in the UN GTR No 22 as determined during the certification. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Remaining usable battery energy (dppk:remainingUsableEnergy) The usable battery energy at the present point in the lifetime of a battery. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
State of certified energy (SOCE) (dppk:soce) The measured or on-board usable battery energy performance at a specific point in its lifetime, expressed as a percentage of the certified usable battery energy. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
State of Charge (SoC) (dppk:stateOfCharge) The available energy or charge in a battery expressed as a percentage of rated capacity. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Minimum voltage (dppk:voltageMinimum) The lower voltage limit that the safe operation of the battery is rated for. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Maximum voltage (dppk:voltageMaximum) The upper voltage limit that the safe operation of the battery is rated for. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Nominal voltage (dppk:voltageNominal) The suitable approximate value of the voltage used to designate or identify the battery. dppk:CapacityInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Original power capability (dppk:powerOriginal) The amount of energy that a battery is capable to provide over a given period of time under reference conditions. dppk:PowerInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Remaining power capability (dppk:powerRemaining) Information on the remaining power capability as information on the state of health of the battery. dppk:PowerInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Power fade (dppk:powerFade) The decrease over time and upon usage in the amount of power that a battery can deliver at the rated voltage. dppk:PowerInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Maximum permitted battery power (dppk:powerMaximumPermitted) The value of maximum permitted power the battery is rated for. dppk:PowerInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Ratio between nominal battery power and battery energy (dppk:powerEnergyRatio) Provides an indication of the applicable discharge and charge rate in terms of rated capacity (C-rate). dppk:PowerInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Initial round trip energy efficiency (dppk:roundTripEfficiencyInitial) The ratio of the net energy delivered by a battery during a discharge test to the total energy required to restore the initial state of charge. dppk:EfficiencyInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Round trip energy efficiency at 50% of cycle life (dppk:roundTripEfficiencyAt50Cycles) Round trip energy efficiency measured at 50% of cycle-life. dppk:EfficiencyInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Remaining round trip energy efficiency (dppk:roundTripEfficiencyRemaining) The in-use analogy to the initial roundtrip energy efficiency. dppk:EfficiencyInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Energy round trip efficiency fade (dppk:roundTripEfficiencyFade) The decrease of round trip energy efficiency as percentage. dppk:EfficiencyInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Initial self-discharge rate (dppk:selfDischargeInitial) The self-discharge-rate in an idle state of the battery in reference conditions at begin of life. dppk:EfficiencyInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Current self-discharge rate (dppk:selfDischargeCurrent) The change of the self-discharge rate in an idle state of the battery. dppk:EfficiencyInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Evolution of self-discharge rates (dppk:selfDischargeEvolution) The change of self-discharge over time and usage, calculated from the initial and current self-discharge rate. dppk:EfficiencyInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Initial internal resistance of battery cell and pack (dppk:internalResistanceInitial) The opposition to the flow of current within a cell or a battery under reference conditions. dppk:InternalResistanceInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Internal resistance increase of pack (dppk:internalResistanceIncrease) The increase over time and upon usage of internal resistance. dppk:InternalResistanceInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Expected lifetime in calendar years (dppk:expectedLifetimeYears) The expected life-time under the reference conditions for which they have been designed in calendar years. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Expected lifetime: Number of charge-discharge cycles (dppk:expectedLifetimeCycles) The expected life-time under the reference conditions for which they have been designed in terms of cycles. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:integer Battery.jsonld
Number of full charging and discharging cycles (dppk:cycleCountFull) The value for the number of full charging and discharging cycles should result from the aggregation of partial cycles occurring in the use phase. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:integer Battery.jsonld
Cycle-life reference test (dppk:referenceTestCycleLife) The reference test used for determining the expected battery lifetime in cycles. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:string Battery.jsonld
C-rate of relevant cycle-life test (dppk:cRateCycleTest) Applied charge and discharge rate in terms of rated capacity (C-rate) of relevant cycle-life reference test. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Energy throughput (dppk:energyThroughput) The overall sum of the energy throughput over the battery lifetime at a specific time during usage. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Capacity throughput (dppk:capacityThroughput) The overall sum of the capacity throughput over the battery lifetime at a specific time during usage. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Capacity threshold for exhaustion (dppk:exhaustionCapacityThreshold) The percentage of SOCE, above which the battery is still considered operational. dppk:LifetimeInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Temperature range idle state, lower boundary (dppk:temperatureIdleLower) The lower boundary of the surrounding temperature range the battery can withstand when not in use. dppk:TemperatureInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Temperature range idle state, upper boundary (dppk:temperatureIdleUpper) The upper boundary of the surrounding temperature range the battery can withstand when not in use. dppk:TemperatureInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Time spent in extreme temperatures above boundary (dppk:timeExtremeTempUpper) The aggregated time in which temperatures above the upper boundary of the temperature range are prevalent. dppk:TemperatureInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Time spent in extreme temperatures below boundary (dppk:timeExtremeTempLower) The aggregated time in which temperatures below the lower boundary of the temperature range are prevalent. dppk:TemperatureInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Time spent charging during extreme temperatures above boundary (dppk:timeChargingTempUpper) The aggregated time in which the battery is charged while temperatures above the upper boundary are prevalent. dppk:TemperatureInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Time spent charging during extreme temperatures below boundary (dppk:timeChargingTempLower) The aggregated time in which the battery is charged while temperatures below the lower boundary are prevalent. dppk:TemperatureInfo xsd:double Battery.jsonld
Number of deep discharge events (dppk:eventsDeepDischarge) The number of occasions in which voltage has dropped below the lower operational limit. dppk:NegativeEventsInfo xsd:integer Battery.jsonld
Number of overcharge events (dppk:eventsOvercharge) The number of occasions in which voltage has increased above the upper operational limit. dppk:NegativeEventsInfo xsd:integer Battery.jsonld
Information on accidents (dppk:eventsAccidents) Information and data resulting from use such as accidents, based on measuring abrupt positive or negative acceleration. dppk:NegativeEventsInfo xsd:string Battery.jsonld

Part of the DPP Keystone project.
